title: Junior Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!
